data.title: ETH Price Drop Triggers Partial Liquidation of High-Leverage Position
data.description: According to Odaily, a brief decline in Ethereum (ETH) prices last night led to the partial liquidation of a 25x leveraged long position held by a trader known as Machi Big Brother. Hyperbot data indicates that the trader quickly increased their position, now holding 3,775 ETH valued at approximately $11.5 million. The position has since returned to profitability, with a liquidation price set at $2,936.18 and an unrealized profit of around $127,000.

data.title: Jupiter announces its 2026 Jupuary airdrop plan: a total of 700 million JUP, with a snapshot at the end of January next year.
data.description: Jupiter has disclosed its plans for the next Jupuary airdrop in 2026. The total allocation for this quarter remains at 700 million JUP, distributed as follows: 1. Initially, only 200 million JUP will be allocated, with 25 million JUP allocated to stakers and 175 million JUP to users; 2. For users: only interactions involving paid fees are eligible, such as ultra and perps; 3. A 200 million JUP reward pool will be reserved. Users who receive the airdrop and maintain their staked tokens will receive this portion of the airdrop before the next conference in 2027; 4. The remaining 300 million JUP will be reserved for Jupnet; 5. The snapshot date is set for January 30, 2026. (Note: Jupiter mentioned at the time of JUP's genesis that it would airdrop 4 billion JUP through four rounds of Jupuary events.) In 2024, the first Jupuary airdropped 1 billion JUP; subsequently, the remaining 3 billion JUP airdrop prize pool shrank to 2.1 billion JUP as 30% of the total JUP supply was burned; in 2025, the second Jupuary airdropped another 700 million JUP; currently, there are still 1.4 billion JUP available for future Jupuary airdrops.

data.title: Brother Machi's Ethereum long positions turned from loss to profit; after some were liquidated, he urgently added to his position, bringing it to 3775 ETH.
data.description: Last night, the price of ETH briefly dropped, causing some of Machi Dage's 25x leveraged long positions in Ethereum to be liquidated. Hyperbot data shows that Machi Dage subsequently added to his position, and he now holds 3,775 ETH, worth approximately $11.5 million, and has turned a profit. The liquidation price was $2,936.18, and he currently has a floating profit of approximately $127,000.

data.title: Whale Address Faces Significant Losses in ETH and XRP Positions
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on-chain analyst Ai Yi (@ai_9684xtpa) has reported that a whale address, known for earning over $39.88 million through seven short positions since the flash crash on October 11, is currently experiencing substantial unrealized losses in its long positions on ETH and XRP. 

The address has accumulated a total unrealized loss of $18.58 million. Specifically, it holds a long position of $184 million in ETH at an opening price of $3,219, resulting in an unrealized loss of $11.6 million. Additionally, it has a long position of $94 million in ETH at an opening price of $2.29, with an unrealized loss of $7.4 million.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Trader Faces Significant Losses Amid Market Volatility
data.description: According to Foresight News, a cryptocurrency trader known for previously shorting ASTER has incurred substantial unrealized losses totaling $18.58 million from long positions in ETH, XRP, and DOGE. Since the market flash crash on October 11, this trader had successfully executed seven short trades, earning over $39.88 million.

data.title: "Anti-CZ whale" goes long on ETH/XRP/DOGE, accumulating a floating loss of $18.58 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the address (0x9ee...1daAb) that previously profited $10.66 million by shorting ASTER through "anti-CZ" tactics has now accumulated a floating loss of $18.58 million due to long positions in ETH, XRP, and DOGE. Since the October 11th flash crash, this address has accumulated profits of over $39.88 million through seven shorting operations.

data.title: BlackRock signals it is working on a new staked Ethereum trust ETF
data.description:
BlackRock is now pursuing a new staked Ethereum ETF, offering more lucrative returns, approximately 15 months after launching its flagship ETH fund, ETHA.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/blackrock-registers-trust-staked-eth-etf?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: New ETFs Tracking XRP and Dogecoin Expected to Debut Soon
data.description: According to Odaily, Bloomberg analyst James Seyffart has indicated that new ETFs tracking XRP and Dogecoin are anticipated to debut in the coming trading days. Seyffart noted that Bitwise's XRP ETF, with the ticker XRP, is likely to begin trading on Thursday. Additionally, Grayscale and Franklin Templeton's XRP funds, along with Grayscale's Dogecoin ETF, could be listed as early as next Monday. These launches follow the recent introduction of several altcoin funds, such as Canary Capital's XRP fund (XRPC), which achieved a net investment of $58 million on its first day, surpassing the initial performance of Bitwise's Solana ETF. Currently, the 11 Bitcoin funds listed in the United States manage assets exceeding $130 billion.

data.title: In 2022, an address that held WBTC at an average price of $16,933 sold 176.17 WBTC, making a profit of $12.815 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the smart money address (0xADc...395F) that bought WBTC at an average price of $16,933 at the bottom of 2022 has sold a total of 176.17 WBTC since yesterday, worth approximately $15.799 million. The average selling price was $89,679, resulting in a profit of $12.815 million. This address currently still holds 280.479 WBTC, worth $25.73 million.

data.title: Analysts expect the Bitwise XRP ETF to begin trading on Thursday, and the Grayscale Dogecoin ETF is expected to list next week.
data.description: Bloomberg analyst James Seyffart says new ETFs tracking XRP and Dogecoin are expected to debut in the coming trading days. He says Bitwise's XRP ETF (ticker symbol: XRP) is likely to begin trading on Thursday. Meanwhile, Grayscale and Franklin Templeton's XRP funds, as well as Grayscale's Dogecoin ETF, could list as early as next Monday. These listings follow the recent launches of several altcoin funds, such as Canary Capital's XRP fund (XRPC), which saw $58 million in net investments on its first day, surpassing the first-day performance of the Bitwise Solana ETF. Currently, 11 Bitcoin funds listed in the US manage over $130 billion in assets.

data.title: US stocks closed lower across the board for crypto stocks, with BMNR falling more than 9%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.1%, the S&P 500 rose 0.38%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.59%. The crypto sector generally declined, with BMNR falling 9.6%, COIN falling 1.72%, CRCL falling 8.98%, and MSTR falling 9.82%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Significant Ethereum Transfers from SharpLink to Galaxy Digital OTC Wallets
data.description:
According to Odaily, blockchain analyst Yu Jin reported that 5,533 ETH, valued at $16.52 million, were transferred from the SharpLink address (0x70D...13E3) to the Galaxy Digital OTC wallet three hours ago.

Since early yesterday, a total of 10,975 ETH, worth $33.54 million, have been moved from SharpLink to Galaxy Digital.

data.title: SharpLink address transferred 5533 ETH to Galaxy Digital OTC wallet 3 hours ago.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, 5,533 ETH (worth $16.52 million) were transferred from the SharpLink address (0x70D...13E3) to the Galaxy Digital OTC wallet 3 hours ago. Since early yesterday morning, a total of 10,975 ETH (worth $33.54 million) has been transferred from the SharpLink address to Galaxy Digital.

data.title: 21Shares Solana Spot ETF Approved for Trading
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the 21Shares Solana Spot ETF has received official approval and is set to commence trading under the ticker symbol TSOL. The ETF will include a staking feature.

data.title: The 21Shares Solana ETF has been approved and is now available for trading.
data.description: 21shares US announced on its X platform that its Solana ETF has been officially approved and is now trading under the ticker symbol TSOL. Users can invest through banks or brokerage firms.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 92,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.33% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Nov 20, 2025, 00:31 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 92,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 92,018.203125 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.33% decrease in 24 hours.
